title: thushan/olla
summary: High-performance lightweight proxy and load balancer for LLM infrastructure. Intelligent routing, automatic failover and unified model discovery across local and remote inference backends.

title: wyc-dev/MATS
summary: An autonomous, self-evolving quantitative trading system powered by 8 specialized AI agents with institutional-grade risk management.

title: tylerjrbuell/reactive-agents-ts
summary: A composable TypeScript framework for building reliable LLM agents on a harness you fully control. The same code runs the agent loop on every model tier — local 4B to frontier — with tool-call healing, verification, and durable crash-resume, on a typed 12-phase engine where every step emits an event you can hook into. Effect-TS, MCP-native, MIT.

title: ckoenig673/recipe-clipper
summary: A self-hosted recipe manager with AI-powered imports, OCR, social media recipe extraction, meal planning, grocery lists, and cookbook organization.

title: supernovae-st/nika
summary: Intent as Code | the workflow language for AI. One file, 4 verbs, one Rust binary. Local-first, any model, AGPL-3.0. 🦋

title: ovg-project/kvcached
summary: Virtualized Elastic KV Cache for Dynamic GPU Sharing and Beyond

title: SciSpectator/genevariate
summary: Gene Expression Variability Analysis Platform with AI-powered biological metadata extraction. Runs locally via Ollama — no cloud, no API keys.

title: dimaCaptain/rag-engine
summary: Local-first RAG + LLM chat gateway as a headless HTTP service: ingest docs, embed locally via Ollama, retrieve, stream grounded chat

title: askalf/hybrid
summary: Local-first LLM router: answer the easy majority on a small local model, escalate only the hard queries to any OpenAI-compatible frontier endpoint. ~160 lines, stdlib-only.

title: cifyr/UniVerse
summary: Local-first macOS academic workspace: Canvas sync, a per-course knowledge base, and a source-grounded AI assistant that runs on your own machine.

title: GCTRL-TECH/platform
summary: Governed graph-native agent memory: knowledge extraction, fusion, hybrid RAG, scoped access tokens. A push for data sovereignty.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: Zanmmi/micro-agent-cli
summary: 🏆 Ultralight AI Coding Agent 2026 — Blazing CLI, Tiny Codebase, Full Power Free

title: aliyevaladddin/AladdinAI
summary: AladdinAI: open-source BYOI (Bring Your Own Infrastructure) AI Agent platform. Connect your own VMs, NVIDIA NIM, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama — build and manage AI agents visually.

title: dovvnloading/Cortex
summary: Cortex is a fast, private desktop AI assistant for running local Large Language Models with Ollama. Everything stays on your device: no cloud, no external servers, and no third parties.

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: Nano-Collective/nanocoder
summary: An open coding agent for your terminal, built by a community collective rather than a company. Bring your own model, keep your code on your machine, and owe nothing to anyone.

title: camronwood/neural-junkie
summary: Multi-agent orchestration for teams and individuals — local-first AI, custom experts, Slack integration, and collaboration with human approval.

title: temiroff/Blacknode
summary: A visual runtime for AI, GPU computing, and robotics, workflow framework for AI agents. MCP-native typed graphs, visual editor, Python export.

title: unusdon/ai-chatbot-saas
summary: Open-source multi-tenant RAG chatbot platform. Train on PDFs/DOCX/URLs, deploy across web widget + Telegram + WhatsApp. 5 LLMs (OpenAI · Claude · Gemini · Deepseek · Ollama). Next.js + Postgres + pgvector. MIT.
